leadText: Huge Power (Japanese: ちからもち Muscleman) is an Ability introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation VI, it was the signature Ability of Marill's evolutionary line.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation IV 1.1.2 Generation V onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Huge Power doubles the Attack stat of the Pokémon with this Ability. Because it is an Attack modifier and not a stat stage change, it will double the user's effective Attack stat when using Foul Play or Body Press . Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Huge Power also affects self-inflicted confusion damage. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Huge Power no longer affects confusion damage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Huge Power has no effect outside of battle.
